## NYT::NFlow::TReadStatesArg {#NYT_NFlow_TReadStatesArg}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/state_access.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/state_access.h)

Argument of the `read-states` command.

The command supports three usage modes (determined by the set of filled fields):

1. Only `computation_id` &mdash; all states for all partitions of the specified Computation.
2. `computation_id` + `key` &mdash; point lookup by key in `key_states` (and in external states) of the specified Computation.
3. Only `partition_id` &mdash; all `partition_states` of the specified partition. Additionally, if this partition belongs to `SourceComputation` (each such partition is responsible for exactly one `SourceKey`, unlike regular partitions with a `[LowerKey; UpperKey)` range), `key_states` under this `SourceKey` are also loaded immediately.

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `computation_id` | **Type**: `std::optional<NYT::NFlow::TStrongIdentifierTypedef<NYT::NFlow::TComputationIdTag>>`
ID of the Computation. Required for modes 1 and 2 (see the command description). ||
|| `partition_id` | **Type**: `std::optional<NYT::TStrongTypedef<NYT::TGuid, NYT::NFlow::TPartitionIdTag, NYT::TStrongTypedefOptions{true}>>`
Partition ID. Required for mode 3 (see the command description). ||
|| `key` | **Type**: `std::optional<NYT::NYson::TYsonString>`
Key for point lookup (mode 2). Accepted in two forms:

* **YSON Dict** `{column = value; ...}` &mdash; for each target table (`key_states` of the Computation and each table of the external_state_manager/joiner with its own `key_schema_override`) the dict is decomposed by its key schema; columns absent from the schema are ignored.
* **YSON List** of positional values &mdash; passed to tables as-is, without adaptation to their schema. ||
|| `name` | **Type**: `std::optional<std::string>`
Filter by exact state name; applies to all sections (key/partition/external). If set, only rows with this state name are returned in each section. ||
|| `target` | **Type**: [NYT::NFlow::EFlowStateTarget](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_EFlowStateTarget)
**Default value**: `all`
Which categories of states to request. Default: `all`. ||
|| `limit` | **Type**: `long`
**Default value**: `10`
Maximum number of rows returned in each response section independently.
Sections refer to the response fields: `key_states`, `partition_states`, `external_key_states`, `joined_external_key_states`. Each has its own budget of `limit` rows.

Within the `external_key_states` / `joined_external_key_states` sections, the budget is fairly divided among the active external states of this Computation. ||
|#
